Careers
Be Part of Something More

BWXT Medical Ltd. is a leading provider of innovative medical solutions that offer the opportunity to make a meaningful difference in people’s lives. Through our diverse portfolio of cutting-edge products and services, BWXT Medical plays a vital role in the detection and treatment of a wide range of medical conditions, delivering health and hope to patients across the globe.

 

Why BWXT Medical?

At BWXT Medical, our employees are motivated by the life-saving treatments and technologies they work on each and every day. 

Our collaborative and diverse workplace encourages team work and innovation, providing all employees the opportunity to work in a productive and supportive workplace.

 

View Opportunities

You will be directed to our parent company, BWX Technologies’ careers page, to view all available opportunities.
